'''Geriss''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was located within the [[Geonosis system/Legends|Geonosis system]]. It occupied that [[Star system/Legends|star system's]] first [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]].<ref name="TEA" />

{{Planet-stub}}
